language.name: English
app.saved_session_invalid: Saved session is invalid, authorization is required.
app.no_saved_session: No saved session found, first authorization is required.
app.startup_sync_done: Startup sync finished. Watching for new posts.
app.forwarder_running: Forwarder is running. Press Ctrl+C to stop.
app.already_running: Another Telerixa process is already running (PID {pid}).
app.owner_stopped: Forwarder stopped because its console owner disappeared: {reason}
app.telegram_disconnect_error: Could not disconnect cleanly from Telegram: {error}
config.file_missing: {file} was not found. Create it next to the script.
config.invalid_json: Could not read {file}. Check commas and quotes.
config.invalid_large_file_action: Unknown LARGE_FILE_ACTION={action}. Falling back to send_text_link.
config.required_missing: Required config fields are missing: TELEGRAM_CHANNELS or DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL.
config.timezone_not_found: Timezone {timezone} was not found. Falling back to the local system timezone. Install tzdata for precise Europe/Berlin support.
send.initial_album_terminal: Initial album send ended with terminal error
send.initial_message_terminal: Initial message send ended with terminal error
send.no_valid_media: No valid media files to send
legacy.seen_not_list: {file} does not contain a list, starting with an empty database.
legacy.seen_broken: {file} is corrupted, starting with an empty database.
legacy.migrated_channels: Legacy seen_messages.json was migrated to SQLite for channels: {count}.
legacy.processed_inserted: Legacy seen IDs were added to deduplication: {count}.
processed.queued_without_pending: Channel @{channel}: ID {message_id} is marked as queued, but there is no pending queue row. Trying to process it again.
alert.dropped:
{mention}WARNING: Telegram post was dropped from retry queue.
Post: https://t.me/{channel}/{message_id}
Attempts: `{attempts}`
Reason: `{reason}`
telegram.reply_fetch_failed: Could not fetch reply/quote for post {message_id}: {error}
telegram.cross_reply_fetch_failed: Could not fetch cross-channel reply/quote for post {message_id}: {error}
network.dns_discord: DNS could not resolve discord.com. Check Internet/DNS on SteamOS. Details: {error}
startup.catch_up_begin: Startup sync: catching up to {limit} fresh posts per channel.
startup.no_backlog: Channel @{channel}: last_seen={last_seen}, latest={latest}. No old tail.
startup.skipped_old_ids: Channel @{channel}: last_seen={last_seen}, latest={latest}. Skipped old IDs on startup: {count}.
startup.no_forwardable_tail: Channel @{channel}: no supported posts in startup tail.
startup.backlog_skipped: Channel @{channel}: last_seen={last_seen}, latest={latest}. Old backlog skipped up to ID {boundary}; catching up last {count} posts.
startup.tail_to_process: Channel @{channel}: startup tail to process: {count} (ID > {boundary}, latest={latest}).
startup.tail_done: Channel @{channel}: startup tail finished, sent {sent}, queued {queued}, already processed {skipped}, boundary {boundary}.
queue.waiting: Queue: pending retry {pending}, ready now {due}, next attempt in {delay} sec ({retry_at}).
queue.message_unavailable: Message @{channel}/{message_id} is no longer available. Recording it as failed and removing it from queue.
queue.delivered: Message @{channel}/{message_id} was delivered from queue. Channel boundary moved to {boundary}.
queue.kept: Message @{channel}/{message_id} stayed in queue. Attempts: {attempts}/{max_attempts}. Reason: {reason}
queue.transient_kept: Message @{channel}/{message_id} stayed in queue after a temporary network/service failure. This failure does not consume the retry limit. Reason: {reason}
queue.progress_saved: Queue delivery progress saved for @{channel}/{message_id}: next chunk {next_chunk}, media_sent={media_sent}.
queue.resuming_progress: Resuming @{channel}/{message_id} from queue progress: next chunk {next_chunk}, media_sent={media_sent}.
queue.send_failed: Could not send @{channel}/{message_id} from queue: {reason}. Attempts: {attempts}/{max_attempts}.
channel.album_terminal_not_queued: Channel @{channel}: album ID {message_id} was not queued because of terminal error: {reason}
channel.album_queued: Channel @{channel}: album ID {message_id} added to queue.
channel.message_terminal_not_queued: Channel @{channel}: message ID {message_id} was not queued because of terminal error: {reason}
channel.message_queued: Channel @{channel}: message ID {message_id} added to queue.
channel.chronological_batch: Chronological delivery batch: {count} posts from {channels} channels.
channel.all_checked_with_sent: [{time}] Checked all channels. New publications sent: {count}
channel.all_checked_empty: [{time}] Checked all channels. No new messages.
media.album_path_missing: Telegram did not return a media path from album ({media_type}).
media.album_lookup_failed: Could not collect album @{channel}/grouped_id={grouped_id} near message {message_id}: {error}
media.album_collected_single: Album @{channel}/grouped_id={grouped_id} collected only {count} item near message {message_id} with radius {radius}: ids=[{ids}]
media.path_missing: Telegram did not return a media path ({media_type}).
media.partial_download: Media was not downloaded completely. Message will be retried through queue.
media.file_too_large_try: File {file_path} is larger than {limit} MB, trying to send it anyway.
media.file_too_large_skip_attach: File {file_path} is larger than {limit} MB, not attaching it.
media.all_large_send_text_link: All media files are over the limit. Sending post text with Telegram link.
media.all_large_skip_post: All media files are over the limit. Skipping post and moving on.
media.no_files_to_send: There are no files that can be sent to Discord.
media.discord_413_skip: Discord returned 413 Payload Too Large. skip_post is configured, so the post is skipped.
media.discord_413_text_link: Discord returned 413 Payload Too Large. Current configured limit: {limit} MB. Sending post text with Telegram link.
media.rich_detected: Native rich message {message_id}: {blocks} blocks, {media} embedded media files.
ui.action.try_send_then_text: Try sending, then send text on error
ui.language_hint: Changes apply after saving. The running bot will reload the language without restart.
ui.file_limit_int: File limit must be an integer from 1 to 500.
ui.file_limit_range: File limit must be between 1 and 500 MB.
ui.catch_up_int: Startup catch-up must be an integer from 0 to 500.
ui.catch_up_range: Startup catch-up must be between 0 and 500 posts.
ui.max_queue_attempts_int: Retry limit must be an integer from 1 to 200.
ui.max_queue_attempts_range: Retry limit must be between 1 and 200 attempts.
ui.webhook_prefix: Discord webhook must start with https://discord.com/api/webhooks/.
ui.subtitle: Settings are saved to config.json. The running bot will pick up changes on the next check.
ui.discord_webhook_hint: Webhook URL for a Discord channel or thread.
ui.telegram_channels_hint: One public username per line. @ and t.me links are allowed. Latin letters, digits, and _, 5-32 characters.
ui.discord_file_limit_hint: Examples: 10 without boost, 50 for Tier 2, 95 for Tier 3 with safety margin.
ui.large_videos_hint: What to do when media exceeds the selected limit.
ui.startup_catch_up_hint: How many fresh posts to catch up after downtime. 0 means do not catch up old posts.
ui.max_queue_attempts_hint: After this many non-network failures, the post is removed with a log and alert. Temporary network/service failures do not consume this limit.
ui.invalid_channels: Invalid Telegram channels: {items}. Public username required: Latin letters, digits, _, 5-32 characters.
ui.duplicate_channels: Duplicate Telegram channels: {items}. Remove duplicates before saving.
ui.no_channels: Add at least one Telegram channel.
ui.saved_notice: Settings saved. The bot will pick them up on the next check.
ui.overview_subtitle: Delivery state, channel checkpoints, and recent failures.
ui.logs_subtitle: Recent UI and bot events from local log files.
ui.retry_waiting: Waiting for the bot to retry this post.
ui.retry_missing: The queued message no longer exists.
ui.confirm_clear_queue: Remove every message from the retry queue? This cannot be undone.
ui.confirm_dismiss_failure: Hide this failure from the active list? Its history will be preserved.
ui.failure_missing: This failed-delivery record is no longer open.
ui.failure_already_pending: This post is already present in the retry queue.
ui.failure_requeued: The failed post was returned to the retry queue with its saved delivery progress.
ui.failure_requeue_failed: Could not requeue the failed post: {error}
ui.failure_dismissed: The failure was dismissed. Its history remains in the database.
ui.diagnostic_not_run: Diagnostics have not been run yet.
ui.diagnostic_database_missing: The state database does not exist yet.
ui.diagnostic_database_error: Could not read the state database: {error}
ui.diagnostic_schema_outdated: Database schema is missing: {tables}. Start the updated bot once to migrate it.
ui.diagnostic_database_ok: Integrity and schema checks passed. Database size: {size}.
ui.diagnostic_ffmpeg_missing: Not installed. This is optional until video conversion is enabled.
ui.diagnostic_discord_not_configured: A valid Discord webhook is not configured.
ui.diagnostic_discord_rejected: Discord rejected the webhook with HTTP {http_status}.
ui.diagnostic_discord_http_error: Discord returned HTTP {http_status}; try again later.
ui.diagnostic_discord_invalid_response: Discord returned an unexpected webhook response.
ui.diagnostic_discord_ok: Webhook metadata is reachable; no message was sent.
ui.diagnostic_telegram_not_configured: Telegram API credentials are missing or invalid.
ui.diagnostic_telegram_session_missing: The Telegram session file does not exist yet.
ui.diagnostic_telegram_session_error: Could not read the Telegram session: {error}
ui.diagnostic_telegram_session_empty: The Telegram session does not contain a data-center record.
ui.diagnostic_telegram_session_ok: Session storage is readable (DC {dc_id}). Authorization remains owned by the bot process.
